# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We actively update and patch the latest version of Vencore. Please upgrade to the latest stable release to ensure you have all security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| v1.27.x | ✅ Yes    |
| < v1.27 | ❌ No     |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Vencore, please report it privately. Do not open a public GitHub issue for security bugs.

Report vulnerabilities via email to **security@vencore.in** with:
1. A description of the vulnerability.
2. Step-by-step reproduction instructions or a proof-of-concept script.
3. The potential impact of the issue.

We will acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours and work with you to resolve the issue promptly. We request that you follow responsible disclosure guidelines and wait for a patch before publishing details of the vulnerability.
